query:
SELECT 'lanes' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM lanes
UNION ALL SELECT 'pillars', COUNT(*) FROM pillars
UNION ALL SELECT 'series', COUNT(*) FROM series
UNION ALL SELECT 'angles', COUNT(*) FROM angles
UNION ALL SELECT 'posts (Main)', COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE slotType = 'Main'
UNION ALL SELECT 'posts (Video)', COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE slotType = 'Video'
UNION ALL SELECT 'optional_posts', COUNT(*) FROM optional_posts
UNION ALL SELECT 'posts (total)', COUNT(*) FROM posts;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Wmw2s9e6VwZQ1V.ed7cfaa6430e --database 5DQjKtUEL6F458wSzFzJar --execute SELECT 'lanes' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM lanes
UNION ALL SELECT 'pillars', COUNT(*) FROM pillars
UNION ALL SELECT 'series', COUNT(*) FROM series
UNION ALL SELECT 'angles', COUNT(*) FROM angles
UNION ALL SELECT 'posts (Main)', COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE slotType = 'Main'
UNION ALL SELECT 'posts (Video)', COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE slotType = 'Video'
UNION ALL SELECT 'optional_posts', COUNT(*) FROM optional_posts
UNION ALL SELECT 'posts (total)', COUNT(*) FROM posts;
